_comment: Edit this file when you install the bullet-journal skill. These are the only knobs you need to set. Nothing personal or deployment-specific should live in SKILL.md. Set the active 'storage' block to one backend; '_storage_examples' shows other backends you could copy into 'storage'.

slack.location: #bullet-journal channel (or a Slack Canvas titled 'Bullet Journal')
slack.notes: Post one message per entry via the Slack connector, e.g. 'YYYY-MM-DD — entry text [tag1, tag2]'. For a running document instead of a feed, append to a Slack Canvas. Writable from Slack on mobile, web, and desktop.

file.notes: Append one line per entry: '- YYYY-MM-DD [tag1, tag2] entry text'. Single machine only.

storage.notes: Columns: Date (date), Entry (text), Tags (multi-select). Use the Notion connector to create one row per entry. To use a different backend, copy one of the blocks from '_storage_examples' into 'storage'.
